newman_command: newman run postman_collection.json -e postman_environment.json --reporters cli,json --reporter-json-export results.json
quality_notes: All test data uses synthetic values only - zero real PII
All assertions are deterministic with explicit SLA thresholds
Security tests document findings via console.log for audit trail
Full 41/41 endpoint coverage achieved - 7 previously uncovered endpoints now included
New scenarios SCN-063 to SCN-069 cover EP-008, EP-011, EP-014, EP-017, EP-020, EP-026, EP-040
